gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward, gestures with both hands to the screen, and smiles while showcasing the colorful objects
a person tilts their head slightly, raises one hand with an open palm, and looks around as if inviting responses
a tutor lifts one arm, counts with fingers to the side, and nods enthusiastically while emphasizing each count
a person moves closer to the object groups, points with excitement to the second group while counting aloud
a tutor draws both hands together, looks at the class, and asks curiously while raising eyebrows to encourage thinking
a person extends both arms outward, encouragingly gestures toward the screen, and invites everyone to start combining groups
a tutor faces the class, steps back slightly, and gestures with an open hand while encouraging everyone to count aloud
a person claps hands together joyfully, steps forward with a big smile, and celebrates the success of learning addition
a tutor gestures with hands moving in circles, reinforcing the idea of combining groups, and nods while explaining
